methodology: Each URL was loaded in headless Chromium. Page title and body text were searched for the target asset (GME/GameStop) and the claimed metric. Status: exact = asset and metric confirmed; proxy = asset confirmed, metric definition may differ; unsupported = no viable free live source; unverified = bot protection or HTTP error; wrong-asset = page shows different asset.

accepted.page_title: GameStop Corp. (GME) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance
accepted.finding: GME stock price and quote confirmed.
GME Max Pain Calculator confirmed with per-expiry strike and OI breakdown.
Max pain strike confirmed; convergence % is derivable but not shown as a labeled field.

accepted.page_title: GME Put/Call Ratio for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME put/call ratio for volume and open interest confirmed.

accepted.page_title: GME Gamma Exposure (GEX) for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME-specific GEX confirmed. Shows GAMMA EXPOSURE for May 22nd, 2026 with market-maker positioning data.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Volatility & Greeks for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME implied volatility and greeks confirmed including near-30-DTE IV.

accepted.page_title: GME Gamma Exposure (GEX) for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GEX by strike confirmed. Gamma flip (zero-crossing of cumulative GEX) is derivable from chart data but may not appear as a single labeled value.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Volatility & Greeks for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME historical volatility confirmed on the Volatility & Greeks page.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Volatility & Greeks for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: IV Rank definition confirmed on page: current IV compared to highest and lowest values over the past 1-year.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Volatility & Greeks for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: IV Percentile visible. Barchart lookback window may differ from mart's 252-session definition.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Prices for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME options chain with per-contract OI confirmed. Day-over-day OI delta requires comparing across dates.

accepted.page_title: GME Gamma Exposure (GEX) for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GEX confirmed. Dealer net gamma (sum across all strikes) is derivable; may not appear as a single labeled scalar.

accepted.page_title: GME - GameStop , Reddit sentiment and mention history
accepted.finding: GME Reddit mention count confirmed. Aggregation scope (specific subreddits) may differ from mart fixture definition.

accepted.page_title: GME Options Prices for Gamestop Corp Stock - Barchart.com
accepted.finding: GME options chain with sortable OI per strike confirmed.

unsupported.finding: No free live source provides a mention-weighted average sentiment score in the -1 to +1 range matching this mart's definition. Mart value uses a seed fixture for CI only and is not valid for live operator comparison.

unverified.card: ER Cycle Phase / Days to Next ER
unverified.finding: GameStop Investor Relations inaccessible to headless browser. Official public source for GME earnings dates; dates also published in SEC 8-K/10-Q filings on EDGAR.
Cloudflare bot-protection in headless browser. Known public source; manual verification shows IV data for GME. Primary reference replaced with Barchart Volatility & Greeks (verified exact).

rejected.rejection_reason: wrong-asset: SqueezeMetrics DIX/GEX tracks S&P 500 market-wide gamma exposure only. Page title confirms 'sqzme | Fresh perspectives on stock data' with no GME-specific content. All three prior SqueezeMetrics references (net_gex, gamma_flip_point, dealer_net_gamma) replaced with Barchart Gamma Exposure.
Discussion forum, not a machine-readable or structured data endpoint for social mention counts.
Discussion forum. Cannot provide a mention-weighted average sentiment score. Metric marked unsupported.
Navigation failed: execution context destroyed on redirect. Replaced by maximum-pain.com (verified exact).
wrong-asset: page shows SPY/S&P 500 content by default, not GME.
